text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 60 

OTHC_PRMRY_PMT 

LABEL: Other Part B Carrier Primary Payer Amount 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the total amount paid for Part B carrier and DME claims which appear in settings 
other than the 10 specific categories which are part of this file by a primary payer other than Medicare 
for a given year. Claim lines for other carrier/DME claims are a subset of the claims
